title: ambrosia flexuosa
intro: Ambrosia flexuosa, also known as flexible bur sage or flexible goldenrod, is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ambrosia flexuosa include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Ambrosia flexuosa can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
